omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "Conflict of Interest" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: NA_HomePage

childElements.name: Additional_Conflict_of_Interest_Disclosure
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Do you have any other potential conflicts of interest that you would like to disclose?", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Conflict_of_Interest_Certification_Acknowledgement
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "SCP Health Conflict of Interest\r\nCertification and Acknowledgement", "text" : "SCP Health Conflict of Interest
Certification and Acknowledgement", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Conflict_of_Interest_Disclosure
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "I hereby certify that the information set forth above is true and complete to the best of my knowledge, and I expressly authorize SCP Health (SCP) to confirm the accuracy of same through all appropriate means, including contacting the appropriate parties for same. I hereby further acknowledge and understand that SCP may, from time to time, request additional information, but that it is my sole obligation to notify SCP Health in the event that any circumstances or information herein changes or requires updating throughout the year.", "text" : "", "required" : false, "readOnly" : false, "checkLabel" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Conflict_of_Interest_Disclosure_Business_Financial_Interests
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Are you or a family member engaged in some influential capacity (board membership, consulting, or other political arrangements) or have a material financial interest in a business or enterprise that competes directly, indirectly with, or provides a similar service (health care facility, clinic, diagnostic service, practice management service, staffing or recruiting service, physicians practice, medical billing company, medical coding company or any health care related service) as the Company, irrespective of the location of such business?", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Conflict_of_Interest_Disclosure_Details_of_Financial_Business_Interests
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If you answered yes, please disclose details -", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Yes", "condition" : "=", "field" : "Conflict_of_Interest_Disclosure_Business_Financial_Interests" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Detailed_Disclosure_of_Gifts_Payments_and_Related_Interactions
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If you answered yes, please disclose details -", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Yes", "condition" : "=", "field" : "Gifts_Favors_and_Payments_Disclosure" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Do_you_have_any_personal_relationships
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Do you have any personal relationships, such as friends or family connections, who do business with or work for the Company that could lead you to provide preferential treatment, or that could cause others to believe that you are providing preferential treatment due to your personal relationship?", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Financial_interest_in_a_current_or_potential_vendor_supplier_or_client
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Do you or a family member have a financial interest in a current or potential vendor, supplier, or client of the Company?", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

If_Financial_Interest_Yes
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If you answered yes, please disclose details -", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Yes", "condition" : "=", "field" : "Financial_interest_in_a_current_or_potential_vendor_supplier_or_client" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }
